member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Core.Services.IProductInventorySearchService
member.summary: This interface is intended to search the product inventories within all fulfillment centers, do a LeftJoin search with fulfillment centers and return InventoryInfo object for each Fulfillment center registered in the system even if it won't have an inventory record for a given product

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.InventoryModule.Data.Extensions.GeoExtensions.CalculateDistance(VirtoCommerce.SearchModule.Core.Model.GeoPoint,VirtoCommerce.SearchModule.Core.Model.GeoPoint)
member.summary: Calculate distance between two geopoints in meters
